title: Clone_persist_gtid causes memory leak
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT NOT NULL, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));

CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (order_id), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.username, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > 50;
key_bug_features: Clone_persist_gtid thread requests memory during lock_tables
